user_goal: 按 MVP PRD §12 与 §4.5 在 B011 Master Portfolio 之后实现 Paper Trading prep MVP：定义 Target Positions 输出格式（百分比 + 美元双输出）、Broker Adapter 抽象接口（无真实 broker SDK 导入）、Mock Broker（JSON Lines append-only journal-only，固定研究账户状态）、Backtest→Paper 桥接（任意时间手动触发），同时保持 fixture/mock-first CI、研究-only 语义、no-live/no-secret/no-network-by-default/no-broker/no-paper/no-AI safety guards。

session_notes.planner: 2026-05-13: Closed B011 done wrap-up (removed BL-B010-S2 absorbed, added BL-B011-S2 satellite strategies, session_notes refreshed). User confirmed next batch direction: B012 Paper Trading prep MVP per MVP PRD §12 + §4.5. Decisions captured: (1) Target Positions output emits BOTH percentage weights AND dollar exposures, (2) Mock Broker journal format = JSON Lines append-only immutable (planner recommendation, accepted by user), (3) Mock Broker returns a fixed research account state (default USD 250000 cash, zero open positions), (4) any-time manual trigger via direct function call — bridge does not enforce cadence. Hard boundary: no real broker SDK import (ib_insync / alpaca / futu / tiger / tradier / polygon), no paper-trading API URL, no simulated fills / P&L tracking. Wrote B012 spec and features.json (6 features: F001-F005 generator + F006 codex). Status moved to building for Generator F001.
